description: Read-only security/RBAC reviewer. Enforces auth, schemas, mass-assignment safety, secrets, and infra consistency.

capabilities.review_auth: Verify all endpoints have Depends(obtener_usuario_actual_db) or Depends(requerir_modulo(...))
capabilities.review_schemas: Reject datos: dict in Pydantic/SQLAlchemy; enforce Field(pattern) on PK str fields
capabilities.review_secrets: Verify default secrets in config.py have startup guards
capabilities.review_logging: Reject print() in route handlers; enforce PII redaction

command_patterns.review <files>: Review security/RBAC surface for files or diffs
command_patterns.checklist <scope>: Return the relevant subset of the security checklist

review_history.scope: logical annulment of activities and related endpoints
focused re-review of activity logical annulment concurrency lock
